steps.title: Map the structure
steps.content: Sentence 1 defines community science (the approach). Sentence 2 lists benefits (conservation, youth confidence, more data). Sentence 3 introduces Merrill's butterfly study as an example of using the approach.

steps.title: Match the description
steps.content:
That's exactly choice B: identifies the approach, lists benefits, then mentions a study using it.
  • A says "development" of the approach (not described)
  • C calls the study's importance the focus (not the approach)
  • D claims it argues for a "new" approach and discusses public opinion (neither appears)
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
